name: Chocolate Chip Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar, margarine, and oil until smooth.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour cream; mix well.
3. Mix flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Stir in grated zucchini and chocolate chips.
6. Pour batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
